seoTitle: How to Add Emails in Brevo Easily (2026)
metaDescription: Learn how to manually add a single email address to your Brevo contact database, assign it to a list, and confirm opt-in compliance.
intro: Sometimes you just need to drop one new lead or client email into your system without a full spreadsheet import. This guide covers Brevo's single-contact creation wizard, from entering the email and personal details to assigning the right subscriber list and confirming marketing consent. It's the fastest path for one-off additions to your database.

steps.heading: Open the Contacts tab
steps.body: Log into Brevo and click Contacts in the left navigation to reach your subscriber database.

steps.heading: Start a new contact
steps.body: Click the Add a contact button in the upper right of the database grid to open the creation form.

steps.heading: Enter the email and details
steps.body: Type the subscriber's email address into the primary field, then fill in optional attributes like first name, last name, or mobile number.

steps.heading: Assign a list and confirm consent
steps.body: Choose which subscriber list the contact belongs to, and check the compliance box confirming you have consent to email them.

steps.heading: Save and verify
steps.body: Click Create contact, then use the search bar to look up the new email and confirm it appears in your database.

faq.question: Do I need consent confirmation to add a contact manually?
faq.answer: Yes, Brevo requires you to check a compliance box affirming you have legal consent before the contact can be created.

faq.question: Can I add a phone number when creating a contact?
faq.answer: Yes, there's an optional SMS field where you can enter a mobile number using the correct country code format.

faq.question: Will a manually added contact show up in existing automations?
faq.answer: It depends on which list you assign them to; if that list is an entry trigger for an automation, they may enter that workflow automatically.

faq.question: How do I confirm a contact was added successfully?
faq.answer: Use the search bar at the top of the Contacts dashboard to look up the email and verify the new record appears.
